---
title: "Sovereign Bead System"
generated_at: "2026-03-27 12:18:02"
authoritative_source: "hall_beads"
---

# Sovereign Bead System

`tasks.qmd` is a projection of the Hall of Records. Do not edit bead state here.

- Repository: `repo:.`
- Open Beads: `0`
- Set Pending: `0`
- Set Beads: `0`
- In Progress: `0`
- Ready For Review: `0`
- Needs Triage: `2`
- Blocked: `0`
- Resolved: `4`
- Archived: `0`
- Superseded: `0`

## Open Beads
- None

## Set-Pending Beads
- None

## Set Beads
- None

## Beads In Progress
- None

## Beads Ready For Review
- None

## Beads Requiring Triage
- [?] [bead_mission_1774310429087] `weave:fail` :: Mission execution: weave:fail | scan: scan:bead-baseline:1774626705216 | baseline: 0.00 | triage: Missing acceptance criteria.
- [?] [bead_mission_1774310429087:exec:weave:fail:1774310429092] `weave:fail` :: Execution of weave:fail under mission MISSION-64964 | scan: scan:bead-baseline:1774626705216 | baseline: 0.00 | triage: Missing acceptance criteria.

## Blocked Beads
- None

## Resolved Beads
- [x] [bead:release:github-release] `.github/workflows/distribution-release.yml` :: Publish single-repo Gemini and Codex bundles through GitHub Releases on version tags. | scan: scan:bead-baseline:1774626705216 | baseline: 0.00 | agent: NORN | contracts: tests/unit/test_release_bundles.test.ts | acceptance: Workflow creates release-ready artifacts from this repository and attaches publishable host bundles to tagged releases. | triage: Awaiting canonical validation evidence. | note: Accepted after focused release-flow verification: node scripts/run-tsx.mjs --test tests/unit/test_release_bundles.test.ts tests/unit/test_release_archives.test.ts tests/unit/test_distribution_manifests.test.ts tests/unit/test_distribution_installers.test.ts; node scripts/run-tsx.mjs scripts/prepare_release.ts. | validation: validation:github-release
- [x] [bead:release:archives] `scripts/build_release_archives.ts` :: Generate versioned zip archives for Gemini and Codex bundles from dist/host-distributions. | scan: scan:bead-baseline:1774626705216 | baseline: 0.00 | agent: NORN | contracts: tests/unit/test_release_archives.test.ts | acceptance: Release preparation emits deterministic versioned archives and an archive manifest derived from the generated host distributions. | triage: Awaiting canonical validation evidence. | note: Accepted after archive verification: node scripts/run-tsx.mjs --test tests/unit/test_release_archives.test.ts; node scripts/run-tsx.mjs scripts/prepare_release.ts. | validation: validation:archives
- [x] [bead:release:docs] `README.qmd` :: Document single-repo Gemini and Codex install and release commands in the main repository docs. | scan: scan:bead-baseline:1774626705216 | baseline: 0.00 | agent: NORN | contracts: README.qmd | acceptance: Main README documents local install commands, release preparation, and single-repo host distribution flow without referring to a second repository. | triage: Awaiting canonical validation evidence. | note: Accepted after README and distribution regeneration verification: node scripts/run-tsx.mjs scripts/build_distributions.ts; node scripts/run-tsx.mjs scripts/prepare_release.ts. | validation: validation:docs
- [x] [bead:release:prepare] `package.json` :: Add one release preparation command that regenerates, validates, bundles, and archives host distributions. | scan: scan:bead-baseline:1774626705216 | baseline: 0.00 | agent: NORN | contracts: tests/unit/test_release_archives.test.ts | acceptance: A single npm command prepares all host release artifacts and fails fast if any generation step drifts or breaks. | triage: Awaiting canonical validation evidence. | note: Accepted after end-to-end release preparation succeeded: node scripts/run-tsx.mjs scripts/prepare_release.ts. | validation: validation:prepare

## Archived Beads
- None

## Superseded Beads
- None
